title: pharbitis scabra
intro: Pharbitis scabra, also known as the prickly poppy or prickly pharbitis, is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that have been used for centuries to treat various health issues. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Pharbitis scabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into a holistic health regimen.
